call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: I was thinking more about a car down payment. 
Agent: Excellent! A car is a great use of funds. Now, the monthly payments would be approximately $198 for 60 months. Does that fit within your budget? 
Eleanor: Hmm, yeah, I think so. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $200, and that's it. No prepayment penalties. 
Eleanor: Okay. And the interest rate is fixed at 8.99%? 
Agent: Absolutely. Fixed for the life of the loan. We can get the paperwork started right away if you'd like. 
Eleanor: Yeah, okay. Let's do it.

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, we acquired your information through a marketing partner. We're pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! That's outrageous! I already have a credit card. 
Agent: Well, sir, this card offers rewards points and a lower APR after six months of responsible use. 
Robert: I don't need another credit card. And frankly, I'm not happy about being called out of the blue. Take me off your list. 
Agent: I understand, sir. I apologize for the inconvenience. I'll make a note of your request. Have a good day.

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. Your friend, Michael, referred you to us. He mentioned you might be interested in a personal loan. 
Jessica: Oh, yeah, Michael did mention something. I'm thinking about renovating my kitchen. 
Agent: That's fantastic! We can definitely help with that. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.49%. The terms are very flexible. 
Jessica: 7.49%? That sounds pretty good. What's the monthly payment? 
Agent: Approximately $290 for 60 months. We also offer options for 36 or 48 months if you'd like to pay it off faster. 
Jessica: Hmm, okay. What about fees? 
Agent: There's a $300 origination fee, but we can sometimes waive that for preferred customers. 
Jessica: Could you waive it for me? 
Agent: Let me see... given your excellent credit score, I can definitely make a case for it. I'll need to get approval from my supervisor, but I'm confident we can waive the fee. 
Jessica: That would be great! 
Agent: Wonderful! Let's proceed with the application then.

Agent: Hello, Mr. Lee? This is Lisa from Finance Solutions. We have a great offer on our Signature Credit Card. 
David: (Interrupting) You guys called me yesterday! I told you I'm not interested! Where did you even get my number?! 
Agent: Sir, I apologize for the repeated call. We're offering a $8,000 Signature Credit Card at 17.99%. 
David: 17.99?! Are you kidding me? This is harassment! I want to be removed from your list immediately! 
Agent: Sir, I understand your frustration... 
David: (Hangs up abruptly)

Agent: Hello, Mrs. Rodriguez? This is Kevin calling from Finance Solutions. I see you inquired about a personal loan on our website. 
Maria: Oh, yes, hello. I'm a little hard of hearing, could you speak up a bit? 
Agent: Certainly, Mrs. Rodriguez. My apologies. We are pre-approving you for a $3,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 14.5%. Would that be helpful for covering some unexpected expenses? 
Maria: Well, my roof is leaking, and I've been putting it off. It's quite a worry, you know? 
Agent: I understand. A leaky roof is definitely a concern. This loan could provide the funds to get it repaired quickly. The monthly payments would be around $75 for 48 months. 
Maria: $75? That sounds manageable. What about the fees? 
Agent: There's a $150 processing fee, but we can discuss that further. We also offer a hardship program if you ever encounter difficulties with payments. 
Maria: Oh, that's good to know. 
Agent: Absolutely. I can send you an email with all the details and a link to the application. Would that be alright? 
Maria: Yes, please. That would be very helpful.
